Twenty-Eight Years of Life, Together

10TH MAY, 1998

The Beginning of Everything

Two families, one moment, and a lifetime promised. Usha and Muniprasanna became husband and wife at Sri Venkateshwara Kalyana Souda, Gokula, Bangalore — surrounded by flowers, blessings, and everyone they loved.

1999

Charan Arrives

Their first child, a son, came into the world. The two became three. Every dream got a little louder, and home became a completely different kind of place.

2004

Jahanvi Completes the Family

Their daughter arrived and the family was complete. Four people, one home, one story. The kind of family people talk about with warmth in their voices.

2007 – 2008

Building Event Linkx from the Ground Up

Muniprasanna built a business from nothing but belief and hard work. Event Linkx became real — a living proof of what happens when a person simply refuses to stop.

2018 – 2019

The World, as a Family

Singapore and Malaysia — they took Charan along and showed him the world. Not just on a map, but in person. The sights, the food, the culture — a gift no classroom can ever replace.

2020 – 2022

When the World Stopped

The pandemic brought everything to a halt — and the events industry bore the worst of it. What took years to build was tested overnight. But they held together. Through every sleepless night and every difficult morning, they held each other up.

2023 – 2025

The Hard Years — and Still Standing

Health worries. Financial storms. The kind of weight that would break most families. But they carried it together, as a team, as a unit — Daddy's strength, Mummy's love, and a family that simply refused to fall apart.

10TH MAY, 2026

Twenty-Eight Years ✦ And the Story Is Far From Over

Today, two children who watched you love each other every single day want to say: we see you. We are so proud of you. The best chapters are still being written.

The Foundation

The four of us
"

Daddy. Mummy.

You gave us everything before we even knew to ask for it.

You built this family with your bare hands and your whole hearts. You smiled through the hard days. You prayed through the harder ones. And through all of it — you stayed. For each other. For us.

These last couple of years have not been easy. We know that. You know that. But what you have shown us — the quiet, steady, never-giving-up kind of strength — that is something we will carry for the rest of our lives.

God has been watching over this family. He always has. And we believe, with everything we have, that His greatest blessings for us are still on their way. Health. Joy. Peace. Abundance. More places to see, more tables to sit around, more laughter echoing through this house.

There is so much life still left to live. So many mornings still to wake up healthy and together. So many reasons to celebrate what is coming.

We are so proud to be your children. We love you more than we will ever find the right words for.

Happy 28th Anniversary, Daddy and Mummy. ✦
Twenty-eight beautiful years — and many, many more to come.

With all our love  ✦  Charan & Jahanvi

What We Wish For You

🙏

God's Blessing & Protection

May the Lord who has carried this family through every storm continue to walk ahead of you, clearing every path and protecting every step. You are never alone.

💛

Good Health, Always

Strong bodies, peaceful minds, and many more years of living fully. You have so much still to do, and we need you here — healthy and whole — for all of it.

✨

Success & Abundance

Every seed you planted through years of hard work — may it bloom now. The toughest chapter is behind you. The harvest is coming, and it will be everything you deserve.

✈️

More of the World to See

Singapore. Malaysia. The adventures are not over. There are more places to see, more sunsets to stand under, more memories to make — and we will share every single one of them together.

🌅

Joy in Every Morning

May every morning bring something to smile about. May this home always be filled with warmth, laughter, good food, and the sound of family.

❤️

A Love That Only Grows

Twenty-seven years. Still the two of you, side by side. May that never change. May what you share grow quieter and deeper and more beautiful with every passing year.

Usha & Muniprasanna

Together since the 10th of May, 1998

TWENTY-EIGHT YEARS  ✦  AND COUNTING

May God bless this family with every happiness, every comfort, and every dream still waiting to come true.
The best of your story is still ahead.
